_notes: Comprehensive session journal for s-2026-04-17-01. Supersedes the interim snippet-2026-04-17-sproutlab-c0-emergency.json filed earlier (that one covered only C0 v3; this one covers the full session arc including C0 v3.1 and the multi-governor review chain in full). Aurelius: import this as the authoritative session entry and supersede the interim one if desired.

data.summary: SproutLab Device Sync emergency — four distinct bugs surfaced and fixed across two patches (C0 v3 and C0 v3.1). B3 (shadow contaminated by local-intent at sync.js:471, collapsing the flush diff) was the dominant cause of the reported 'data disappearing every refresh' symptom and was discovered during Kael's Governor audit after Lyra had flagged it as a speculative footnote. B4 (dotted-path keys in set+merge create literal-dotted top-level fields instead of nested updates) surfaced after C0 v3 canary passed, revealed by multi-device state that Architect's wife's phone rejoin exposed. Both patches verified in production. First full Edict V exercise under PERSONA_REGISTRY v1.1 — four signatures (Lyra Builder, Maren Care Governor, Kael Intelligence Governor, Cipher Censor) plus Consul summons.

data.handoff: Two patches shipped and canary-verified. Session 1 reconcile spec unchanged; Aurelius's handoff v2 still the authoritative contract for that work. Next session (after Co4 rotation): Session 1 C1 primitives, then C2–C6 per spec §12. SproutLab docs/ filed with: spec + v1 handoff + v2 handoff + R3 snippet (Canon 0027 mv) + C0 deploy runbook + final chronicle + this session-journal snippet + chapter/schism/lore/apocrypha snippets + two candidate canon drafts. Orphan dotted-literal fields manually cleaned by Architect in Firebase Console; fix prevents regrowth.
